name: Tiancheng Zuo
description: __Species:__ Evolved Human __Height:__ 178 cm Zuo Tiancheng is the main protagonist of The Last Human series. He is an evolved human that died once on an alternative timeline and come back to life ten years into the past. He is determined to reunite again with who was his lover in his past life and save all the friends that lost the first time that he lived the Apocalypse. ~!He is classified as a stage 3 evolved human in the current chapter of Moshi Fanren.!~

name: Tsugumi Nazar

name: Tsutomu Komano
description: __Height:__ 157 cm __School:__ Municipal Mizusawa High School - Year 2 Class 1 - Karuta Club secretary and recorder of matches __Karuta Society:__ Shirohoku Society - B Class An intelligent boy in Chihaya's class who is second only to Taichi in test scores. Often tied to his desk and anti-social, he feels that nothing is worth doing unless it makes you smarter. However, Chihaya and Taichi help to convince him that karuta involves a lot of strategies and he joins the club. He is also left-handed.

name: Waluigi
description: __Height:__ 190 cm Waluigi is Luigi's lanky rival and Wario's partner. Waluigi made his debut in Mario Tennis, and since then, he has made playable appearances exclusively in the Mario franchise's spin-off titles. He makes an appearance as a playable character in all but one game in the Mario Tennis series. He has been voiced by Charles Martinet ever since his debut. His name is a portmanteau of the Japanese words warui, meaning "bad", and Ruīji, meaning "Luigi."

name: Xiaochun Bai
description: Bai Xiaochun is the main protagonist of A Will Eternal, chinese web novel.

name: Yaritsukai
description: Spearman is a silver-ranked adventurer based in the frontier. He is the partner of Witch. As a silver ranked adventurer, the third highest rank attainable, he induces the respect of his fellow adventurers, especially newbies, who look up to him. He has brown spiky hair, and has light red earrings matching the color of his eyes. He wears a resplendent blue armor and is equipped with his singature weapon, a spear. name: Yuka Jennifer Sasago
nativeName: 笹子・ジェニファー・由香
description: **Position:** VJ/Chorus Yuka is a member of **[Peaky P-key](https://anilist.co/staff/260890/Peaky-Pkey)**. Yuka is the moodmaker of Peaky P-key. She met [Kyouko](https://anilist.co/character/182718) as she was searching for the "perfect snapshot" to capture with her camera and decided to join the unit as a VJ. Raised by parents who work as gym trainers, she is very cheerful and kind to everyone.

name: Yuujirou Shihoudani
description: The Western Princess, he is a confident boy and doesn't have many problems with dressing up like a girl in front of other people. He constantly likes to tease Mikoto because he thinks it's fun how Mikoto reacts. He has distanced himself from the rest of his family because he thinks that his mother, step-father, and younger half-brother together are the "perfect family". name: Yuuri Hasegawa
description: Yuuri is a sophomore at St. Margaret High School for Girls. She is a Gyaru who follows new fashion trends, but she falls in love with Keiichiro, who lives in a completely different world to hers.

name: Akiko Minase
description: Akiko is Nayuki Minase's mother and Yuichi Aizawa's aunt whose main role is in Nayuki's arc. Akiko is a kind and caring person. She is a great cook and is proud of her special and unique jam, which no one likes. It's unknown if she has tasted it or if she likes it. She tends to answer yes and no very quickly, usually in one second. name: Alain Saverio
description: **Nationality**: American A young boy living in a deeply religious and isolated Christian household during the '90s. Often feels betrayed but inevitably chained to God, whom he zealously prays to, and has deep-rooted self-hatred issues. Shy and naive, Alain desires a special connection and new experience, and as he escapes his parents and his sin, he finds them with [Hayden](https://anilist.co/character/261634)—another alike and caring soul.

name: Alleyne
description: One of the oldest and most seasoned veteran warriors of a tribe of forest elves, Alleyne is taciturn and blunt in her dealings with others. She's had a long relationship with Echidna, who she often chastises for her loose ways but is mocked in return for her inexperience with men. The appearance of the half-elf Nowa in the forest elf community marked a turning point for Alleyne, who appointed her "guardian of the forest". name: Amana Oosaki
description: __Height:__ 159 cm __Hometown:__ Toyama __Hobbies:__ Shopping, Nails, Selfies Tenka's younger twin sister. Amana is a selfless girl who wants the best for everyone around her - even if it means neglecting her own wishes. A fashionable and extroverted gyaru, she appears to be the polar opposite of her twin, Tenka, but they love each other more than anyone can possibly know. name: Belphegor
description: As the representation of Sloth, the laziest and easy-going of the Mortal Sins with white hair, mouse-like ears and two tiger-striped antelope-type horns. Her favorite hobby is playing on a smartphone.

name: Blade
description: Blade is a transfer student at Rosewood Academy. He is the great hero, a unique existence in the world, destined to defeat evil. Due to this immense burden, Blade was never able to relate to other people nor form bonds of friendship with anyone, this being the reason for his obsession with being a normal person.
